title: fix: harden seed upgrade scoring against gaming
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Guarding the garden
gist.blurb: We've tuned the Seed tier upgrade logic to ensure real builders get their well-deserved pollen. Empty repositories and fake stars won't trick the system anymore—only genuine code grows here.
gist.summary: Enhanced the automated Spore-to-Seed upgrade system with quality filtering and fraud detection to ensure fair rewards for genuine contributors.
gist.impact: Legitimate developers will continue to upgrade seamlessly, while new automated checks prevent empty repositories from gaming the tier system.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny detective hat, inspecting a healthy code-plant with a magnifying glass. The Nomnom creature is eating a stack of fake, empty flower pots. Represents quality control and weeding out the fake stats.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny detective hat, inspecting a healthy, glowing code-plant with a magnifying glass. Nearby, the round Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of empty, barren flower pots. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
